 {"id":"bd-dss9","title":"Conformance: execute poll_ops fixture cases","description":"Extend the poll_ops conformance test so every poll/select fixture case runs through frankenlibc_fixture_exec::execute_fixture_case and compares against expected_output. Verify with focused rch test/check/clippy.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverHarbor","created_at":"2026-04-18T05:43:39.083290831Z","created_by":"SilverHarbor","updated_at":"2026-04-18T05:47:15.873717Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T05:47:15.871683250Z","close_reason":"Implemented executable poll_ops fixture coverage; verified with rch test/check/clippy","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","poll","testing"]}
 {"id":"bd-e2ct","title":"syscall: close_range invalid flags on reversed bounds should still return EINVAL","description":"Host glibc returns EINVAL for close_range(5, 4, 0x80000000). Add ABI regression coverage so bad flags plus reversed bounds stay in the exact EINVAL bucket.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T08:32:32.686596433Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T08:32:32.686596433Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-e3y8","title":"wordexp parity: quote-aware badchar and command-substitution semantics","description":"Background:
- `wordexp` is marked Implemented, but current parsing is too naive about quoting/escaping context.
- Host glibc accepts quoted and escaped metacharacters literally and only rejects true unquoted shell separators.

Goal:
- Bring the native `wordexp` implementation into parity with host glibc for a bounded shell-lexing slice.

Deliverables:
1) Quote-aware/escape-aware bad-character validation for `wordexp`.
2) Quote-aware command-substitution detection so `WRDE_NOCMD` only rejects real command substitution.
3) Host-parity ABI tests for quoted semicolons, escaped separators, quoted command substitution literals, and bare bad-char cases.

Verification:
- rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-abi --test unistd_abi_test wordexp_ -- --nocapture
- rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --all-targets
- rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-abi --all-targets -- -D warnings","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-18T18:01:59.732205136Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-18T18:09:46.852185122Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T18:09:46.850227737Z","close_reason":"Match glibc wordexp quote/escape badchar and WRDE_NOCMD semantics with host-parity tests","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
-{"id":"bd-e4h4","title":"resolv: extend async-DNS ABI tests with explicit GNU mode constants and badflags expectations","description":"The current unistd_abi async-DNS tests exercise degenerate success cases but not GNU mode semantics. Add explicit GAI_WAIT/GAI_NOWAIT/badflags constants in the ABI test layer and verify errno/output contracts for both valid and invalid mode combinations.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T06:39:25.697508593Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T06:39:25.697508593Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}

Add explicit GAI_WAIT/GAI_NOWAIT/badflags constants in the ABI test layer and verify errno/output contracts for both valid and invalid mode combinations.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T06:39:25.697508593Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-04-21T18:14:17.906979579Z","closed_at":"2026-04-21T18:14:17.904743048Z","close_reason":"Extended async-DNS ABI tests with explicit GNU mode and badflags constants and verified the invalid-mode errno contract against host libc.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-edxwi","title":"syscall: renameat2 invalid flags should override null oldpath EFAULT with EINVAL","description":"Host glibc returns EINVAL for renameat2(AT_FDCWD, NULL, AT_FDCWD, ".", 0x80000000), so invalid flags dominate the null-source-path fault. Add ABI regression coverage for that precedence.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-04-21T09:29:10.460768794Z","created_by":"AmberSignal","updated_at":"2026-04-21T09:29:10.460768794Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0}
 {"id":"bd-ef08","title":"Conformance: direct execute memcpy_strict fixture cases","description":"Add direct frankenlibc_fixture_exec coverage for memcpy_strict.json cases in the harness alongside existing isolated harness coverage.","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"SilverHarbor","created_at":"2026-04-18T10:31:36.123405812Z","created_by":"SilverHarbor","updated_at":"2026-04-18T10:36:11.556412234Z","closed_at":"2026-04-18T10:36:11.554552074Z","close_reason":"Added direct execute_fixture_case coverage for memcpy_strict fixtures and verified with rch test/check/clippy.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["conformance","string","testing"]}
 {"id":"bd-ef2","title":"I/O migration wave: route core unistd/io ABI entrypoints through raw veneer","description":"Critique mapping: #2.

Deliverables:
- Migrate open/close/read/write/pread64/pwrite64/lseek/fcntl subset used by smoke suite.
- Preserve strict mode ABI semantics and hardened mode evidence emission.

Acceptance:
- LD_PRELOAD smoke suite passes with migration enabled.
- Compatibility fixtures show no semantic drift on return values/errno.

Evidence & Test Requirements:
- Add comprehensive unit tests (happy-path, negative, adversarial, and regression cases) for all changed logic.
- Add or update deterministic e2e scripts that exercise strict and hardened modes where relevant.
- Emit structured detailed logs for test/e2e runs (trace_id, mode, API/symbol, outcome, errno, timing, and artifact refs).
- Bead cannot close until test commands and log artifact locations are documented.","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","assignee":"CrimsonCove","created_at":"2026-02-11T02:48:09.198369909Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-02-11T16:20:06.228805Z","closed_at":"2026-02-11T16:20:06.228805Z","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"labels":["critique","io","syscall"]}
